.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH assignment to a single line.
Reformat MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH assignment to a single line.
Add space after 'if' keyword in condition checking file existence.
Add space after 'if' keyword in condition checking stream nullity.
Add space after 'if' keyword and reformat error printing block for directory creation.
Reformat anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the legacy javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE namespace jakarta.annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or relocated in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (often associated with Spring Boot 3 / JDK 17+ migrations), causing a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Adopt Java 17 text blocks for multi-line log message formatting.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statement to ensure safe logging of multi-line strings.
Import CRLFLogConverter utility class required for the new logging format.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles in the log message.
Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Wrap single string argument in an array for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Replace the Hibernate 5 Jackson module with the Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or incompatible in Jakarta EE environments; using the wrong module causes runtime NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors due to missing javax dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the Zalando Problem Jackson modules as they are no longer required or compatible with the current configuration.
Reorder method parameters to place the annotated ObjectProvider after the plain LiquibaseProperties bean.
Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with updated Spring Boot LiquibaseProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in favor of setLabelFilter(String) in newer Spring Boot versions; calling the old method causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent builder with .and() to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The .and() method and legacy fluent API are removed in Spring Security 6; code fails to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to use the new Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace featurePolicy with permissionsPolicy in header configuration to match updated Spring Security 6 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter as the class no longer extends it.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed from the library; importing it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for WebSecurity as the configure(WebSecurity) method is removed.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class WebSecurity is no longer used in the configuration; while not strictly a compile error if unused, it reflects the removal of the API usage.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for HttpMethod as antMatchers with HttpMethod are replaced by requestMatchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: HttpMethod is no longer used in the security configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for SecurityProblemSupport as exception handling is no longer configured via this class.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SecurityProblemSupport is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for CorsFilter as CORS handling is likely moved or simplified.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CorsFilter is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for CsrfFilter as filter ordering is updated.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CsrfFilter is no longer referenced in the class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import for @Import annotation as SecurityProblemSupport is no longer imported.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @Import is no longer used in the class.

Update JwtDecoder bean to inject ClientRegistrationRepository and RestTemplateBuilder for custom claim conversion.
Remove explicit cast to NimbusJwtDecoder as it is no longer required or used.
Set CustomClaimConverter on JwtDecoder to handle custom claims.
Refactor GrantedAuthoritiesMapper lambda to use block body instead of expression body for consistency.
Update authorization rules to permit access to static assets and API documentation endpoints.
Update frame options to sameOrigin instead of deny to allow h2-console and other internal frames.
Update content security policy to use JHipster properties instead of hardcoded string.

Ignore CSRF for h2-console requests.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove CorsFilter dependency from constructor as it is no longer used.
Remove problemSupport field as it is no longer used.
Remove corsFilter field as it is no longer used.
Remove configure(WebSecurity) method as WebSecurity configuration is no longer needed.
Remove exception handling configuration using SecurityProblemSupport.
Update OAuth2 login configuration to use withDefaults().
Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use lambda DSL.
Refactor static resource location and path mappings to use a broader classpath root and specific file extensions instead of directory-based patterns.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if javax is used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException which is no longer needed after simplifying the URL decoding logic.

Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Simplify URL decoding by using StandardCharsets.UTF_8 directly, removing the try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException which is unnecessary for UTF-8.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, reflecting changes in Spring Security 6.x/Spring Framework 6.x.
Remove registration of deprecated Swagger v2 endpoints from CORS configuration.
Add registration for Swagger UI v3 endpoint to CORS configuration.
